hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r .tool_input.command); if [[ "$cmd" == git\ push* ]]; then cd /home/mthdn/repos/quicue && count=$(git rev-list --count github/main..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0) && [ "$count" -gt 1 ] && git reset --soft github/main && git commit -m "$(git log --format=%B github/main..ORIG_HEAD | head -1)" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r .tool_input.command); if [[ "$cmd" == git\ push*github* ]]; then gh run list -R quicue/quicue --json databaseId -q ".[].databaseId" 2>/dev/null | head -20 | xargs -I{} gh run delete {} -R quicue/quicue 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'
